note: Regional agri-services directory. Each entry has a `country` (ISO code, or 'ALL' for services that exist everywhere) and a `cat` for grouping. The app shows ALL entries plus those matching the user's selected country. Served same-origin, cached offline; falls back to a built-in set if it can't load. Add `tel`/`whatsapp` to any entry to show a WhatsApp 'Contact' button; entries without a number show their `how` note instead.

services.name: Agricultural Extension Office
services.desc: Free agronomic & livestock advice, training and programme sign-up.
services.how: Your nearest extension office is usually your first stop for everything.

services.name: Local fresh-produce markets & retailers
services.desc: Sell vegetables & horticulture direct to vendors, supermarkets, schools & hotels.
services.how: Approach municipal markets or supply local retailers directly.

services.name: Private vets & agro-vet shops
services.desc: Vaccines, dipping chemicals, dewormers & animal treatment.
services.how: Find a registered vet or agro-vet in your area.

services.name: Agro-dealers (seed, fertilizer, chemicals)
services.desc: Seed, fertilizer, herbicides & fungicides.
services.how: Buy from licensed agro-dealers and ask for advice on application rates.

services.name: Mechanisation & irrigation hire
services.desc: Tractor, planter & sprayer hire; drip kits, pumps, piping & boreholes.
services.how: Hire through local service providers or your farmer co-operative.

services.name: BAMB — Botswana Agricultural Marketing Board
services.desc: Buys & stores grain, pulses & oilseeds at announced producer prices.
services.how: Sell at your nearest BAMB depot.

services.name: BMC — Botswana Meat Commission
services.desc: Buys cattle for slaughter & export, priced on weight and grade.
services.how: Book through a BMC feedlot or local cattle agent.

services.name: ISPAAD
services.desc: Subsidised seed, fertilizer & ploughing for arable farmers.
services.how: Register at your Agricultural Extension Office.

services.name: LIMID
services.desc: Grants for small stock, poultry, boreholes, kraals & fencing.
services.how: Apply through your District Agricultural Office.

services.name: CEDA / NDB
services.desc: Subsidised agribusiness loans (CEDA) and agricultural finance (National Development Bank).
services.how: Apply at a branch with a business plan & your farm records.

services.name: Dept. of Veterinary Services
services.desc: Vaccinations, disease control, movement permits & livestock ID (BAITS).
services.how: Contact your local veterinary office.

services.name: Namibia Agronomic Board (NAB)
services.desc: Regulates & supports marketing of grain, mahangu & horticulture.
services.how: Sell controlled crops through registered NAB channels.

services.name: Meatco
services.desc: Meat Corporation of Namibia — buys cattle for slaughter & export.
services.how: Market cattle through Meatco or a registered agent.

services.name: AMTA — Agro-Marketing & Trade Agency
services.desc: Fresh-produce hubs and the national strategic food reserve.
services.how: Supply produce to an AMTA fresh-produce hub.

services.name: Agribank of Namibia
services.desc: Loans for land, livestock, equipment & production.
services.how: Apply at an Agribank branch with your records.

services.name: Min. of Agriculture (MAWLR)
services.desc: Input, drought-relief & dryland crop support programmes.
services.how: Register at your nearest agricultural development centre.

services.name: Directorate of Veterinary Services
services.desc: Vaccinations, disease control & livestock movement permits.
services.how: Contact your state veterinary office.

services.name: Food Reserve Agency (FRA)
services.desc: Buys maize & strategic crops at announced floor prices.
services.how: Sell at your nearest FRA satellite depot.

services.name: ZAMACE
services.desc: Commodity exchange & warehouse-receipt trading for grain.
services.how: Trade through a ZAMACE-certified warehouse.

services.name: FISP — Farmer Input Support Programme
services.desc: Subsidised seed & fertilizer via e-voucher.
services.how: Register through your cooperative & camp extension officer.

services.name: CEEC
services.desc: Citizens Economic Empowerment Commission — agribusiness loans.
services.how: Apply at a CEEC provincial office.

services.name: Dept. of Veterinary Services
services.desc: Vaccinations, dip tanks, disease control & movement permits.
services.how: Contact your district veterinary office.

services.name: Grain Marketing Board (GMB)
services.desc: Buys maize, small grains & oilseeds at producer prices.
services.how: Sell at your nearest GMB depot.

services.name: Agricultural Marketing Authority (AMA)
services.desc: Regulates ag markets & facilitates contract farming.
services.how: Register contracts & marketing through AMA.

services.name: Pfumvudza / Intwasa
services.desc: Government conservation-agriculture input support scheme.
services.how: Register with your local extension (Agritex) officer.

services.name: AFC Holdings
services.desc: Agricultural finance for inputs, equipment & livestock.
services.how: Apply at an AFC / Agribank branch.

services.name: Dept. of Veterinary Services
services.desc: Vaccinations, dipping, disease control & movement permits.
services.how: Contact your district veterinary office.

services.name: Fresh Produce Markets (Joburg, Tshwane, Cape Town)
services.desc: National fresh-produce markets for fruit & vegetables.
services.how: Sell through a market agent at your nearest fresh-produce market.

services.name: Abattoirs & livestock agents
services.desc: Registered abattoirs & auctions for cattle, sheep & goats.
services.how: Market livestock through a registered agent or auction.

services.name: Land Bank
services.desc: Development & commercial agricultural finance.
services.how: Apply through Land Bank with your farm records.

services.name: CASP & Ilima/Letsema
services.desc: Comprehensive Agricultural Support Programme grants for smallholders.
services.how: Apply via your provincial Dept. of Agriculture.

services.name: Provincial Veterinary Services
services.desc: Vaccinations, disease control & animal-health certificates.
services.how: Contact your provincial state vet.

services.name: ADMARC
services.desc: Buys & sells maize and crops through depots nationwide.
services.how: Sell at your nearest ADMARC market.

services.name: AIP — Affordable Inputs Programme
services.desc: Subsidised fertilizer & seed for smallholders.
services.how: Register with your local agricultural extension officer.

services.name: Dept. of Animal Health & Livestock Dev.
services.desc: Vaccinations, disease control & livestock services.
services.how: Contact your district veterinary office.

services.name: Ministry of Agriculture input & block-farming support
services.desc: Input subsidy & block-farming production support.
services.how: Register at your District Agricultural Resource Centre.

services.name: Dept. of Livestock Services
services.desc: Vaccinations, disease control & livestock services.
services.how: Contact your district livestock office.

services.name: National Maize Corporation (NMC)
services.desc: Buys & markets maize and grain.
services.how: Sell through NMC depots.

services.name: Ministry of Agriculture input support
services.desc: Subsidised inputs & smallholder production schemes.
services.how: Register through your rural development area office.

services.name: Dept. of Veterinary & Livestock Services
services.desc: Vaccinations, dipping & disease control.
services.how: Contact your veterinary office.

services.name: Bolsa de Mercadorias de Moçambique
services.desc: Commodity exchange linking farmers to buyers.
services.how: Trade grain & pulses through the exchange.

services.name: SUSTENTA
services.desc: Integrated support programme financing inputs & value chains.
services.how: Register through your SDAE district office.

services.name: Serviços de Veterinária
services.desc: Vaccinations, disease control & livestock services.
services.how: Contact your district veterinary service.

services.name: NCPB — National Cereals & Produce Board
services.desc: Buys maize & cereals and runs the national grain reserve.
services.how: Sell at your nearest NCPB depot.

services.name: Kenya Meat Commission (KMC)
services.desc: Buys cattle, sheep & goats for slaughter.
services.how: Market livestock through KMC or a registered agent.

services.name: Agricultural Finance Corporation (AFC)
services.desc: Affordable loans for inputs, equipment & livestock.
services.how: Apply at an AFC branch with your records.

services.name: National Fertilizer Subsidy (e-voucher)
services.desc: Subsidised fertilizer via registered e-voucher.
services.how: Register through your county agriculture office.

services.name: Directorate of Veterinary Services
services.desc: Vaccinations, disease control & livestock movement permits.
services.how: Contact your sub-county veterinary office.

services.name: National Food Reserve Agency (NFRA)
services.desc: Buys & stores maize for the national reserve.
services.how: Sell at an NFRA buying centre.

services.name: Cooperative unions / CPB
services.desc: Aggregate & market cereals and cash crops.
services.how: Market produce through your cooperative union.

services.name: Tanzania Agricultural Development Bank (TADB)
services.desc: Finance for inputs, equipment & value chains.
services.how: Apply through TADB or a partner bank.

services.name: Veterinary Services (Min. of Livestock)
services.desc: Vaccinations, dipping & disease control.
services.how: Contact your ward / district livestock office.

services.name: Ward Agricultural Extension Officer
services.desc: Local crop & livestock advice and programme sign-up.
services.how: Visit your ward agricultural office.

services.name: Warehouse Receipt System / UCE
services.desc: Store grain & sell via warehouse receipts and the commodity exchange.
services.how: Deposit grain at a certified warehouse.

services.name: Parish Development Model (PDM)
services.desc: Grassroots financing for farming households.
services.how: Join your parish SACCO to access PDM funds.

services.name: Uganda Development Bank (UDB)
services.desc: Agricultural & agro-processing finance.
services.how: Apply through UDB with a business plan.

services.name: District Veterinary Officer
services.desc: Vaccinations, disease control & animal treatment.
services.how: Contact your district production / vet office.

services.name: Extension officers (NAADS)
services.desc: Inputs, advisory & farmer support.
services.how: Reach your sub-county extension officer.

services.name: AFEX / Nigeria Commodity Exchange
services.desc: Warehouse receipts & commodity trading for grain.
services.how: Sell through an AFEX / NCX warehouse.

services.name: Bank of Agriculture (BOA)
services.desc: Concessionary loans for farmers & agribusiness.
services.how: Apply at a BOA branch.

services.name: NIRSAL
services.desc: Risk-sharing facility that unlocks bank lending to farmers.
services.how: Access via NIRSAL-partner banks.

services.name: State Veterinary Services
services.desc: Vaccinations, disease control & animal health.
services.how: Contact your state veterinary clinic.

services.name: ADP — Agricultural Development Programme
services.desc: State extension advice & input support.
services.how: Visit your state ADP office.

services.name: NAFCO — National Food Buffer Stock Co.
services.desc: Buys grain & produce to stabilise prices.
services.how: Sell to a NAFCO-licensed buying company.

services.name: Ghana Commodity Exchange (GCX)
services.desc: Warehouse receipts & trading for maize, soya & more.
services.how: Deposit at a GCX-certified warehouse.

services.name: Planting for Food and Jobs (PFJ)
services.desc: Subsidised seed & fertilizer with extension support.

services.name: Agricultural Development Bank (ADB)
services.desc: Loans for inputs, equipment & agribusiness.
services.how: Apply at an ADB branch.

services.name: Veterinary Services Directorate
services.desc: Vaccinations, disease control & animal health.
services.how: Contact your district veterinary office.

services.name: East Africa Exchange (EAX)
services.desc: Warehouse receipts & commodity trading.
services.how: Sell grain via an EAX warehouse.

services.name: NAEB — export crop board
services.desc: National Agricultural Export Development Board — export markets.
services.how: Market export crops through NAEB.

services.name: Smart Nkunganire System
services.desc: Subsidised seed & fertilizer e-subsidy.
services.how: Register through your agro-dealer / sector office.

services.name: RAB — animal resources board
services.desc: Animal health, vaccination & advisory services.
services.how: Contact RAB or your sector vet.

services.name: Twigire Muhinzi extension
services.desc: Farmer-to-farmer & sector agronomist advice.
services.how: Reach your sector agronomist / farmer promoter.

services.name: Ethiopia Commodity Exchange (ECX)
services.desc: Trades coffee, sesame, grains & pulses.
services.how: Sell through an ECX member or cooperative union.

services.name: Cooperative unions
services.desc: Aggregate & market produce; supply inputs.
services.how: Join your local primary cooperative.

services.name: Development Bank of Ethiopia (DBE)
services.desc: Agricultural & agro-processing investment finance.
services.how: Apply through DBE.

services.name: Veterinary Services (Min. of Agriculture)
services.desc: Vaccinations & animal health services.
services.how: Contact your woreda livestock office.

services.name: Development Agents (Farmer Training Centres)
services.desc: Local agronomic & livestock advice and training.
services.how: Visit your kebele Farmer Training Centre.
